name: Hive-Wide Forensic Scan Utilities
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: RegRipper plugins that scan the entire registry hive rather than specific keys: regtime (all key modification times), sizes (Cobalt Strike 760-value detection), findexes (MZ headers in binary values).
forensic_value: Sizes.pl detects Cobalt Strike's characteristic pattern of 760 REG_SZ values in a single key. Findexes.pl detects PE files (MZ headers) embedded in registry values — shellcode/payload storage. Regtime provides a full timeline of registry key modification timestamps for the entire hive.
